projectDescription: A floating, always-on-top code snippet manager with Firebase-powered storage, AI generation, and one-click clipboard copy.
keyFeatures: Floating draggable bubble UI with quick-access snippet panel
One-click copy to clipboard with last-copied tracking
AI snippet generation via Google Gemini
AI-powered inline code completions in the Monaco editor
Snippet organization with folders, favorites, and pinning
Full-text search across title, code, tags, and language
Import and export snippets as JSON
Real-time Firestore sync with ownership-based security rules
Built-in snippet templates for common patterns
publicApiSurface: Snippet interface (id, title, code, language, description, tags, isFavorite, isPinned, ownerId, lastCopiedAt, createdAt, updatedAt, folderId)
Folder interface (id, name, ownerId, createdAt, updatedAt)
Firebase Auth: Google sign-in via signInWithPopup
